title: arnica alpina var. ungavensis
intro: Arnica alpina var. ungavensis is a subvariety of the mountain arnica plant, native to Canada and Greenland. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful for soothing skin irritations, wounds, and bruises. The plant is rich in flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, compounds that contribute to its healing properties, providing health benefits such as reduced pain and swelling, and promoting tissue repair. Herbal preparations of Arnica alpina var. ungavensis can be found in creams, ointments, and tinctures, which are often used to treat sprains, strains, and other musculoskeletal injuries.
